ubique

Marks an option or operand as global.

Syntax: ubique

Category

cli

Related

  • [optio](/corpus/optio.html)
  • [operandus](/corpus/operandus.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/ubique/ubique.fab (canonical · keyword)

Marks an option or operand as global.

# ubique — global CLI option flag
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   annotationFlag :← 'ubique'
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   No incipit — declaration or test-runner surface only.
#
# BACKEND:
#   declaration-only CLI metadata (whitelist: ubique/ubique.fab).
#

@ cli "ubique-smoke"
@ optio verbose brevis "v" longum "verbose" typus bivalens ubique descriptio "Global verbose flag"
incipit argumenta args {
}
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/ubique/ubique.fab"]
